name: sqlitedata-swift
description: SQLiteData skills — Point-Free's fast, lightweight SwiftData replacement powered by SQLite (GRDB) with CloudKit sync support
author: sitapix

skills.name: sqlitedata-swift
skills.description: Router for SQLiteData questions — routes to sqlitedata-swift-core (models, queries, fetch wrappers), sqlitedata-swift-cloudkit (sync, sharing, metadata), or sqlitedata-swift-ref (API reference) based on the question

skills.name: sqlitedata-swift-core
skills.description: SQLiteData core patterns — @Table models, @FetchAll/@FetchOne/@Fetch property wrappers, FetchKeyRequest, database setup, migrations, dependency injection, query building

skills.name: sqlitedata-swift-cloudkit
skills.description: SQLiteData CloudKit sync — SyncEngine setup, sharing records, SyncMetadata queries, backwards-compatible migrations, schema constraints, account changes, testing sync

skills.name: sqlitedata-swift-ref
skills.description: SQLiteData complete API reference — all public types, property wrappers, SyncEngine methods, FetchKeyRequest, SyncMetadata, DefaultDatabase, re-exported GRDB/StructuredQueries types

skills.name: sqlitedata-swift-diag
skills.description: SQLiteData troubleshooting — common errors, migration failures, sync issues, query problems, permission errors, schema constraint violations

skills.name: sqlitedata-swift-icloud-services
skills.description: Configuring iCloud services in Xcode — CloudKit, Key-value storage, iCloud Documents, capability setup, entitlements, container creation, CloudKit Console access

skills.name: sqlitedata-swift-background-modes
skills.description: Configuring background execution modes — Remote Notifications mode required for CloudKit sync, plus all other background execution modes in Xcode

skills.name: sqlitedata-swift-deploy-schema
skills.description: Deploying an iCloud Container's schema to production — resetting dev environment, dev-to-production schema workflow via CloudKit Console

skills.name: sqlitedata-swift-shared-records
skills.description: CloudKit sharing architecture — CKShare lifecycle, record zones vs hierarchies, inviting participants, managing permissions, custom sharing flows

skills.name: sqlitedata-swift-cloudkit-sharing
skills.description: CloudKit sharing implementation — UICloudSharingController code, CKShare setup, delegate methods, local caching with change tokens, database subscriptions

skills.name: sqlitedata-swift-ckrecord-id
skills.description: CKRecord.ID reference — how SQLiteData maps UUID primary keys to CloudKit record IDs, record name rules, zone IDs, cross-zone lookups

skills.name: sqlitedata-swift-swiftdata-sync
skills.description: SwiftData iCloud sync comparison — CloudKit schema limitations, schema initialization, container configuration, migration context for SQLiteData
